message:
fix(mcp): data race on ready flag, dropped init error, send timeout (#6942, #6943, #6944) (#6969)

- Replace plain bool c.ready with atomic.Bool to eliminate data race
  between concurrent Start/IsReady/CallTool goroutines (#6942)
- Return error from notify() in initialize() so a failed stdin write
  is propagated to callers instead of silently swallowed (#6943)
- Move stdin writes to a dedicated writeMu with a 30s timeout and
  done-channel select, preventing indefinite blocking when the child
  process stops consuming stdin (#6944)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
